title: marsilea subterranea
intro: Marsilea subterranea, also known as the waterclover or swamp clover, is a perennial aquatic plant that grows in submerged or partially submerged environments. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Marsilea subterranea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Marsilea subterranea is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to be used as a natural remedy for various health issues.
